trending_videos.title: State of Play | June 2, 2026 [English]
trending_videos.description:
State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 with more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. 

To kick things off, youвЂ™ll get a closer look at MarvelвЂ™s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will share more from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off LoganвЂ™s brutal and relentless combat along with some new details. This all-new take on the comic book legend launches on PS5 September 15.

Watch the State of Play broadcast live Tuesday, June 2 at 2:00pm PT / 5:00pm ET / 11:00pm CEST | June 3 at 6:00am JST on YouTube and Twitch. The broadcast will be in English, with Japanese subtitles also available. We hope to see you then!

Regarding co-streaming and video-on-demand (VOD)

trending_videos.title: RAYMAN LEGENDS RETOLD | Reveal Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Rayman Legends Retold brings back legendary platforming with new story twists, a brandвЂ‘new realm, Kung Foot, and an expanded soundtrack. Launches October 1.

Sync every move to the beat in unforgettable musical stages, soar across worlds on epic dragon rides, and explore a mysterious new realm in the Glade of Dreams. Play solo or dive into the chaos in up to fourвЂ‘player couch coвЂ‘op, then face off in the fanвЂ‘favorite Kung Foot, now bigger and better than ever.

Pre-order available now: raymanlegendsretold.com 

About Rayman Legends Retold:
Embark on a bold reimagining of the critically acclaimed platformer, enhanced with stunning 3D visuals and an immersive new story leading to a mysterious new realm. Play the adventure solo or in up to fourвЂ‘player couch coвЂ‘op, jam through allвЂ‘new musical stages, saddle up for epic dragon rides, and more!

After the old players took control of Highwater city, they began invading different cities across my kingdom... this time with a different strategy. This is Unstable SMP: Civil War FINALE.

вћњ      @ParrotX2

trending_videos.title: Supergirl | Tickets on Sale Now
trending_videos.description:
Get tickets now and tag who you're bringing to see #Supergirl - only in theaters and IMAX June 26.

вЂњSupergirl,вЂќ DC StudiosвЂ™ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by direc

trending_videos.title: By Any Means | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) вЂ“ Yahya Abdul-Mateen II, Mark Wahlberg
trending_videos.description:
When the system is broken, break the rules By Any Means. Watch the trailer for #ByAnyMeansMovie, only in theatres this September.

Inspired by a true story, a young Black FBI agent (Yahya Abdul-Mateen II) is sent into 1960s Mississippi to investigate a wave of brutal killings targeting civil rights leaders. Forced to work alongside notorious mafia hitman Greg Scarpa (Mark Wahlberg), he finds himself pulled into a deadly hunt where justice and vengeance begin to blur.
When the system is broken, two men divided by everything agree on one thing: the law has limits. They donвЂ™t.

gaming.description: Gaming content is prominently featured, as evidenced by titles like 'State of Play', 'RAYMAN LEGENDS RETOLD', and 'Sony State of Play'.

insights.trend: High interest in gaming events and updates
insights.actionable_insight: Brands should consider aligning content with major gaming events or releases to capture audience interest.

insights.potential_opportunity: Collaborate with gaming influencers for game reviews or live play-throughs to engage the gaming community.

entertainment.description: The entertainment industry, including movie trailers and official music videos, continues to drive significant views.

insights.trend: High production value content like movie trailers are highly engaging.
insights.actionable_insight: Leverage high-quality video production to create teasers or announcements for upcoming projects.

insights.potential_opportunity: Consider partnerships with entertainment studios to offer exclusive behind-the-scenes content.

cultural_events.description: Content related to significant events or cultural phenomena, such as music related to sports events, garners attention.

insights.trend: Music videos tied to major events (e.g., World Cup) receive substantial engagement.
insights.actionable_insight: Create themed content around major cultural events to capitalize on existing buzz.

diversity_in_content.description: Creators are diversifying content offerings, ranging from gaming updates to comedic trailers.

insights.trend: Diverse content types from a single creator can expand reach.
insights.actionable_insight: Encourage creators to experiment with varied content styles to appeal to broader audiences.

engagement_with_fandoms.description: Channels engage deeply with their fan bases, as seen with 'Honest Trailers' and 'Unstable SMP'.

insights.trend: Humor and niche content resonate well with dedicated fandoms.
insights.actionable_insight: Develop content that speaks directly to niche interests or fandoms for increased loyalty and engagement.

cross-industry_collaborations.description: Opportunities exist for collaborations between gaming, music, and entertainment industries.

insights.trend: Cross-promotion between gaming and music, or gaming and film, can enhance visibility.
insights.actionable_insight: Explore partnerships that blend elements from multiple entertainment sectors to create unique content experiences.

emerging_creators.description: New creators have the potential to rise by tapping into trending topics and high-engagement areas.

insights.trend: Emerging creators focusing on trending themes can quickly capture audience attention.
insights.actionable_insight: Identify and support emerging creators who are producing content on trending topics for potentially high returns.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
